languages.text: Эоганн утверждает, что в системе Авиорус находится его старая лаборатория. Он просит Вольного Торговца доставить его туда, чтобы забрать важные образцы.

traits.locale_text: [draft] Эо-ганн попросил слетать в район Авиоруса кое-что забрать.

languages.text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.
languages.original_text: Эоганн утверждает, что в системе Авиорус находится его старая лаборатория. Он просит Вольного Торговца доставить его туда, чтобы забрать важные образцы.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus system. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid to travel there and retrieve important samples.
Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus system. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid to travel there and retrieve important samples.
Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus system. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

languages.text: Laut Eogunn befindet sich sein altes Labor im Aviorus-System. Er bittet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}, ihn dorthin zu begleiten, um wichtige Proben zu bergen.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

traits.locale_text: Laut Eogunn befindet sich sein altes Labor im Aviorus-System. Er bittet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}, ihn dorthin zu begleiten, um wichtige Proben zu bergen.

languages.text: Eogunn affirme que son ancien laboratoire se trouve au sein du système d'Aviorus. Il a besoin de l'aide {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour s'y rendre et récupérer de précieux échantillons.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn affirme que son ancien laboratoire se trouve au sein du système d'Aviorus. Il a besoin de l'aide {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour s'y rendre et récupérer de précieux échantillons.

languages.text: 伊奥贡说他的旧实验室位于艾维罗斯星系。他请求行商浪人协助他去那里取回重要的样本。
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡说他的旧实验室位于艾维罗斯星系。他请求行商浪人协助他去那里取回重要的样本。

languages.text: Eogunn afirma que su antiguo laboratorio está en el sistema Aviorus. Pide a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente que le ayude a llegar ahí a recuperar unas muestras importantes.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn afirma que su antiguo laboratorio está en el sistema Aviorus. Pide a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente que le ayude a llegar ahí a recuperar unas muestras importantes.

languages.text: エオグンはかつての研究所がアビオラス星系にあると主張している。彼はそこへ行き、重要なサンプルを回収するために、ローグ・トレーダーの協力を求めている。
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus system. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

languages.text: Eogunn, eski laboratuvarının Aviorus Sistemi'nde bulunduğunu iddia ediyor. Oraya gitmek ve önemli numuneleri almak için Hür Tacir'in yardımını istiyor.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that his former laboratory is located within the Aviorus System. He seeks the Rogue Trader's aid in travelling there and retrieving important samples.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, eski laboratuvarının Aviorus Sistemi'nde bulunduğunu iddia ediyor. Oraya gitmek ve önemli numuneleri almak için Hür Tacir'in yardımını istiyor.
